title: Estadísticas Históricas de España, siglos XIX-XX (Carreras & Tafunell, coords., Fundación BBVA 2005 — free PDF edition)
license_terms: Fundación BBVA freely-distributed PDF (book itself out of stock in print; publisher offers digital edition free of charge under 'materials available')
notes: Full free PDF of the landmark long-run Spanish historical statistics compendium coordinated by Albert Carreras & Xavier Tafunell (Fundación BBVA, 2nd ed. 2005). Originally shipped with a CD-ROM containing the underlying spreadsheet series; only the book PDF was reachable via the publisher site (fbbva.es 'MATERIALS AVAILABLE' section) — the CD-ROM data tables themselves were not found as a separate downloadable file and were not pursued further (task said log if book-only/paywalled and move on; here at least the PDF text/tables are free, so this is a partial win).
